config.section.RestartRequired.name: Return to the title screen to apply changes
config.ForceMinBarn.name: Premium barn: basic look
config.ForceMinBarn.description: Shows the regular Barn exterior instead of the Deluxe Barn on SVE's Premium Barn.
config.ForceMinCoop.name: Premium coop: basic look
config.ForceMinCoop.description: Shows the regular Coop exterior instead of the Deluxe Coop on SVE's Premium Coop.
config.ForceMinShed.name: Winery: basic shed look
config.ForceMinShed.description: Shows the small Shed exterior instead of the Big Shed on SVE's Winery.
config.ForceMinVanillaBigShed.name: Vanilla Big Shed: basic look
config.ForceMinVanillaBigShed.descriptio: Shows the regular Shed exterior on the vanilla Big Shed (you still upgrade from Shed).
config.EnableBuildingUpgrades.name: Require building upgrades
config.EnableBuildingUpgrades.descriptio: When on, SVE premium buildings must replace the building you're upgrading from. When off, you can build them on their own without upgrading.
